title: PRIMA Spring Form Cake Tin 18x6.8cm, Carbon Steel, Black
features: For making fruit and sponge cakes
Manufactured from heavy duty commercial weight 1mm steel
Double layer non-stick coating with rolled edges
PFOA, PTFE and BPA chemical free non-stick, safer for you and the environment
description: Product Description Perfect for making a variety of fruit and sponge cakes. A variety of sizes are also available, to create tiered celebration and wedding cakes. Manufactured from heavy duty 1mm electroplated carbon steel for total durability and preventing warping. Other features include rolled edges which means no rusting, a double non-stick coating and a loose base for easy release and cleaning. Our bakeware is best in class. Extremely durable! Dishwasher, oven, fridge and freezer safe. Box Contains 1 x spring form tin
